vllm.title: [ci][distributed] fix some cuda init that makes it necessary to use spawn
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Before we separate the driver worker from tp 0 worker, vLLM will require a process without cuda initialization to start for the default multiprocessing method.

vllm.title: [Frontend]: Support base64 embedding
vllm.author: llmpros
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Based on my tests, the current release 0.5.0post1 is able to handle the float and base64 smoothly, just remove the blocker to enable base64
Test 1:
from langchain_openai import OpenAIEmbeddings

emb_model = OpenAIEmbeddings(
    model="/data00/e5-mistral-7b-instruct/",
    openai_api_base="http://10

vllm.title: [Lora] Use safetensor keys instead of adapter_config.json to find unexpected modules.
vllm.author: rkooo567
vllm.bodyExcerpt: in peft if you have target_modules A, B, C and C does not exist in the model it won’t error and model will be trained with A, B loraified. C won’t exist in the safetensor but it will exist in the target_modules of the adapter_config.yaml. So we should use safetensors as the source of truth for valid

vllm.title: [ CI ] Temporarily Disable Large LM-Eval Tests
vllm.author: robertgshaw2-redhat
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
SUMMARY:

turn off large lm-eval tests
currently, takes ~40 minutes since we are redownloading Llama-70B and Mixtral-8x7B from scratch

TODO:

re-enable by mounting a persistent volume rather than re-downloading

BEFORE SUBMITTING, PLEASE READ THE CHECKLIST BELOW AND FILL IN THE DESCRIPTION ABOVE

vllm.title: [Misc] Fix `get_min_capability`
vllm.author: dsikka
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Update the get_min_capability abstract method to be a class method
Update min capability for compressed -tensors for all supported schemes

vllm.title: [ Misc ] Refactor w8a8 to use `process_weights_after_load` (Simplify Weight Loading)
vllm.author: robertgshaw2-redhat
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
SUMMARY:

simplify weight loading logic by converting w8a8 loading to use process_weights_after_load to convert the N logical per-tensor scales into channel-wise scales. This avoids having to pass logical_widths to linear.py, which reduces complexity in that function + combines int8 and fp8 logic to

vllm.author: youkaichao
